heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely; a severe storm again possible, mainly early and south of Route 2. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s north, mid to upper 50s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming west and diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly cloudy, with a chance of showers, mainly in the morning and east of the Greens. Highs from the mid 60s to lower 70s, some lower 60s far north. Winds becoming north 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 40s to lower 50s. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast.
